items.title: U.S. and European interests are 'intertwined,' Secretary of State Rubio says
items.description: Speaking at the Munich Security Conference, the U.S. secretary of State stressed the importance of cooperation with Europe.

items.title: Epstein files: LA28 chief Wasserman puts his talent agency up for sale after Maxwell revelations, WSJ reports
items.description: Casey Wasserman told his firm's staff that he felt that he had "become ‌a distraction" to its work and had begun the process of selling the company.

items.title: What's next for Cuba? Trump turns the screws as the island runs out of jet fuel
items.description: Cuba’s government appears to be on the brink of economic collapse amid a worsening energy crisis.

items.title: Trump says he will issue executive order to get voter-ID requirements before midterms
items.description: President Donald Trump proclaims that he will find a way to implement national voter-ID requirements by November's elections.

items.title: Trump takes a beating from his own party amid Epstein files release and tariffs rebuke
items.description: A series of setbacks for the White House is drawing focus even as Trump touts a drug-pricing initiative, stock market gains, lower inflation as politi...
